title: How to Create a GitHub Repository
intro: Create your first GitHub repo in minutes.
outro: Your repo is live and ready!

steps.title: Go to GitHub.com
steps.description: Open your browser and navigate to GitHub.com.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub homepage hero landing page screenshot interface

steps.title: Sign In to Account
steps.description: Click Sign In and enter your credentials.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub login page sign in form username password screenshot

steps.title: Open the Dashboard
steps.description: You land on your personal GitHub dashboard.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub user dashboard home feed repositories panel screenshot

steps.title: Click New Repository
steps.description: Hit the green New button on the sidebar.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub dashboard sidebar green New repository button screenshot

steps.title: Select an Owner
steps.description: Use the Owner dropdown to pick your account.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub new repository page owner dropdown menu screenshot

steps.title: Enter Repository Name
steps.description: Type a short, memorable name for your repo.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub new repository page repository name input field screenshot

steps.title: Add a Description
steps.description: Optionally describe what your project is about.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub new repository page description text field screenshot

steps.title: Set Visibility
steps.description: Choose Public or Private for your repository.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub new repository page public private visibility radio buttons screenshot

steps.title: Add a README File
steps.description: Check the box to initialize with a README.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub new repository page add README initialize checkbox screenshot

steps.title: Choose a License
steps.description: Select a software license from the dropdown.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub new repository page choose license dropdown menu screenshot

steps.title: Click Create Repository
steps.description: Press the green Create Repository button now.
steps.imageQuery: GitHub new repository page create repository green submit button screenshot

steps.title: View Your Repository
steps.description: Your new repo homepage is ready to use!
steps.imageQuery: GitHub freshly created repository main code tab overview screenshot
